Pause

Pause yourself, have a rest. A cross-platform break reminder for macOS, Windows & Linux.

Download View on GitHub

Features

⏰

Timed Reminders

Customizable break intervals and durations to fit your workflow.

👁

Fullscreen Overlay

A gentle (or firm) fullscreen reminder that you deserve a break.

🔒

Force Mode

Optional strict mode that prevents skipping or postponing breaks.

📈

Analytics

Track your break patterns and see trends over time.

🔔

Sound Alerts

Audio notifications to signal break time.

⚡

Auto Start

Launch automatically when you log in to your computer.

🌐

Bilingual

Full support for English and Chinese.

🖥

Cross-Platform

Works on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Preview

GitHub Releases MIT License

Built with Go + Wails · React + TypeScript · Version ${VERSION}
